_comment: EXAMPLE AWS IAM role trust policy (Part 10 delegation, cloud layer). A specific principal (NO wildcard) and an ExternalId condition to defeat the confused-deputy problem. Cap session length separately via the role's MaxSessionDuration (e.g. 3600s) — it is not set here. Replace the account IDs, role name, and ExternalId with your own; store the ExternalId as a secret, not in source.
